intro:
Jump into high-speed racing
Master every corner
Become a legend
description:
Jump into fast-paced racing action and take control of powerful race cars on exciting tracks.

In Apex 2026: Rise of Legends, every race is about skill, timing, and quick decisions. Learn the tracks, improve your driving, and compete against challenging AI opponents.

Whether you want quick races or a full career experience, the action never stops.

FEATURES
Easy to learn, skill-based driving
Fast and exciting races on multiple tracks
Career Mode and Quick Race
Competitive AI opponents
Dynamic camera views and smooth controls
FIX YOUR MISTAKES

Made a mistake? Keep going.

Use the Rewind system to go back in time, correct your errors, and try again — perfect for learning tracks and improving your skills.

RACE YOUR WAY

Win races, improve your performance, and climb the ranks to become a true racing legend.
